sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click on the pink cross
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 21}])
print(f"Result: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {result.get('done', False)}")

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
pink_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P']
print(f"Pink objects: {len(pink_nodes)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
